name: design-direction
stdout:
{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":281947,"duration_api_ms":282422,"num_turns":20,"result":"Committing to one direction for the v0.2 overhaul: **Editorial-Technical** — an academic notebook with engineering-log restraint. Side-margin notation grid + monospace meta + letterpress serif headings on a humanist sans body. Paper-warm light, deep-ink dark. The accent color is **iron oxide** (warm rust), explicitly not purple/indigo. No shadows by default, no orbs, no glass, no gradient text. Below is the full substance for the 4 spec files. --- ## (a) MOODBOARD — substance **Direction (one-sentence)**: An editorial-technical reading surface — academic-paper rigor (side-margin notation, hairline rules, restrained chromatic accent) with engineering-log restraint (monospace meta, no decoration), executed at production polish in both light and dark modes. **References (6, each with steal-vs-don't):** 1. **EdwardTufte.com / Tufte's books** - Steal: side-margin notation column, asymmetric grid, hairline rules instead of shadows, footnote-as-margin-note tradition, restrained accent (single warm color). - Don't: anachronistic Bembo-only typography, paper-yellow page color saturated to the point of theme-park. 2. **Stripe Press (press.stripe.com)** - Steal: letterpress serif headings on a humanist sans body, generous prose measure, dignified-but-warm product tone, the absence of motion on book pages. - Don't: hardcover-cinematic landing hero, big book covers as decorative anchors (we don't have books). 3. **Robin Sloan's website (robinsloan.com)** - Steal: warm-cream page color, monospace meta lines, hand-edited feel without performative quirk, a personal-but-publishable tone. - Don't: idiosyncratic stretches of one-off typography per post (we need a system that holds across many notes). 4. **Are.na editorial / channels** - Steal: sans-body editorial layout, citation-first hierarchy, restrained chrome, the way meta sits beside content rather than under it. - Don't: dense uniform card grids, the "infinite browsing" affordances (we are reading-first, not grazing-first). 5. **Linear changelog & docs (linear.app)** - Steal: dark mode that feels designed-from-scratch (not inverted), a single accent that survives both modes, hairline borders. - Don't: product-screenshot hero density, the SaaS-pitch motion sequences, gradient-orb backdrops. 6. **Vercel docs / Geist UI** - Steal: monospace-accented inline metadata (kbd, language label chips, version pills), sharp 2–4px radii, content-first layout density. - Don't: brand-colored "AI" promotional surface, code-block copy-button maximalism. **Core visual motifs (3):** 1. **Side-margin notation × monospace meta** — main reading column ~68ch with a ~12rem margin column on `lg+` holding heading anchors (`#`), dates, tags, and (in v0.3) footnote markers. Margin column collapses to inline on `< md`. 2. **Letterpress serif headings on humanist sans body** — `h1–h3` in a serif (Source Serif 4 / Noto Serif KR), body and `h4+` in a humanist sans (Inter / Pretendard). Mono for meta only. 3. **Paper-warm / Deep-ink backgrounds as sole atmosphere** — warm-cream `#f9f6f1` (light), cool-ink `#0f1115` (dark). No gradients, no orbs, no noise overlays. --- ## (b) TOKENS — light + dark draft All web fonts are **self-hosted** (`apps/blog/public/fonts/`). No CDN. Body text vs page bg verified ≥ 4.5:1 in both modes (computed via WCAG relative luminance). ### Color — Background | Token | Light | Dark | Use / Note | |---|---|---|---| | `--color-bg-page` | `#f9f6f1` | `#0f1115` | Page surface. Warm cream / cool ink. Not pure white / pure black on purpose. | | `--color-bg-surface` | `#ffffff` | `#161922` | Cards, embed aside, code block backdrop step-up. | | `--color-bg-surface-strong` | `#f1ede5` | `#1c2030` | Hover state for chips/nav items, table header row. | | `--color-bg-code` | `#f1ede4` | `#1a1d27` | Code block bg, distinct from surface so it reads as code. | ### Color — Text | Token | Light | Dark | Contrast vs page bg | Use | |---|---|---|---|---| | `--color-text-body` | `#1b1d22` | `#dcdee2` | Light 14.8:1, Dark 13.4:1 (both ≥ AAA) | Body prose. | | `--color-text-heading` | `#0a0c10` | `#f1f2f5` | Light 18.6:1, Dark 16.9:1 | Headings. | | `--color-text-muted` | `#5a5e68` | `#9aa0ad` | Light 5.9:1, Dark 5.3:1 (AA pass) | Subordinate prose, captions. | | `--color-text-faded` | `#8a8e98` | `#6b7180` | Light 3.4:1 — **non-body only** | Meta dates, count badges. | | `--color-text-link` | `#a83612` | `#f0a373` | Light 5.7:1, Dark 9.3:1 | Iron-oxide / warm-amber accent. | | `--color-text-link-hover` | `#7c2810` | `#f5be94` | Light 7.6:1, Dark 11.2:1 | Hover state. | | `--color-text-code` | `#1b1d22` | `#dcdee2` | Same as body | Inline code text. | ### Color — Semantic | Token | Light | Dark | Use | |---|---|---|---| | `--color-success` | `#0f7a3a` | `#5fd599` | audit pass, OK badges | | `--color-warn` | `#9a5a06` | `#f0b860` | audit warn | | `--color-error` | `#a51b1b` | `#f08080` | audit fail | | `--color-border` | `#e4dfd3` | `#262a36` | hairline borders, default | | `--color-border-strong` | `#c9c1ad` | `#3a4054` | embed aside ribbon, blockquote rule | | `--color-focus-ring` | `#a83612` | `#f0a373` | mirrors link accent | ### Color — Accent (single brand accent — iron oxide) | Token | Light | Dark | Use | |---|---|---|---| | `--color-accent` | `#a83612` | `#f0a373` | Single brand accent. Used for links, focus ring, heading anchor `#`, blockquote rule. | | `--color-accent-soft` | `#f3e1d6` | `#3a261b` | Subtle accent surface — selection bg, tag chip "active" state. Use sparingly. | > **Why iron oxide**: warm, distinctive, non-AI-default; pairs with paper-cream / ink-warm backgrounds. Single accent only — no purple/indigo, no second brand color in v0.2. ### Typography stacks | Token | Light + Dark | Note | |---|---|---| | `--font-sans` | `Inter, "Pretendard Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Noto Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif` | Body, `h4`, UI. Inter Variable woff2 self-hosted. Pretendard for KR. | | `--font-serif` | `"Source Serif 4", "Noto Serif KR", ui-serif, Georgia, "Apple SD Gothic Neo", serif` | `h1`–`h3` only. Source Serif 4 Variable woff2 self-hosted. | | `--font-mono` | `"JetBrains Mono", "D2Coding", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace` | Code, meta, kbd, language label, brand mark, nav. Self-hosted. | > **Self-host policy** (privacy): all three families self-hosted under `apps/blog/public/fonts/`; never load from Google Fonts / Bunny / etc. (no third-party referrer leak). All three families are OFL-licensed. ### Type scale (modular, 1.25 ratio anchored at 17px body) | Token | Size | Weight | Line-height | Letter-spacing | Family | |---|---|---|---|---|---| | `--text-h1` | 2rem (32px) | 600 | 1.2 | -0.01em | serif | | `--text-h2` | 1.5rem (24px) | 600 | 1.3 | -0.005em | serif | | `--text-h3` | 1.25rem (20px) | 600 | 1.35 | 0 | serif | | `--text-h4` | 1.0625rem (17px) | 600 | 1.4 | 0.005em | sans | | `--text-body` | 1.0625rem (17px) | 400 | 1.7 | 0 | sans | | `--text-small` | 0.875rem (14px) | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | sans | | `--text-meta` | 0.75rem (12px) | 500 | 1.4 | 0.04em (uppercase) | mono | | `--text-code` | 0.9375rem (15px) | 400 | 1.6 | 0 | mono | ### Spacing scale (8-base) | Token | px | Use | |---|---|---| | `--space-1` | 4 | inline-code padding, chip x-padding | | `--space-2` | 8 | tight stacks, list item y | | `--space-3` | 12 | meta-to-title, chip y | | `--space-4` | 16 | paragraph spacing, nav y | | `--space-5` | 24 | section internal | | `--space-6` | 32 | between sections | | `--space-7` | 48 | h2 top margin, between major blocks | | `--space-8` | 64 | nav-to-content, footer top | | `--space-9` | 96 | landing-only top breath | | `--space-10` | 128 | reserved (rarely used) | ### Radius scale (sharp by default) | Token | px | Use | |---|---|---| | `--radius-sm` | 2 | inline code chip, kbd | | `--radius-md` | 4 | tag chip, button, nav item, image caption strip | | `--radius-lg` | 8 | image container, embed aside, code block | > No `radius-xl` / `radius-2xl` / `radius-full` (except decorative dots, e.g. graph nodes which are SVG circles, not box-radius). ### Shadow scale (max 1) | Token | Value | Use | |---|---|---| | `--shadow-1` | `0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06)` light / `0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)` dark | **Only** on sticky header on scroll, as a hairline shadow. No glow, no card lift. | > Cards/asides get `--color-border` 1px solid instead of a shadow. This is a deliberate motif. ### Motion duration / ease | Token | Value | Use | |---|---|---| | `--duration-fast` | 100ms | underline thickness on link | | `--duration-base` | 150ms | link color, button bg, theme toggle icon | | `--duration-menu` | 200ms | mobile menu slide | | `--ease-out` | `cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)` | deceleration, default | | `--ease-linear` | `linear` | color-only transitions | > No `--duration-slow`, no spring tokens. The token tier deliberately omits them so callers can't reach for landing-page motion. `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` zeroes all of these in `base.css`. ### Layout containers | Token | Value | Use | |---|---|---| | `--measure-prose` | 68ch | body reading column (slightly wider than v0.1's 65ch to fit the asymmetric grid) | | `--container-main` | 72ch | main content max-width including margin | | `--container-index` | 56rem | home / tag-index page (wider grid for listings) | | `--margin-col-w` | 12rem | side-margin notation column (lg+ only) | --- ## (c) COMPONENTS — sketches ### `BaseLayout` ```html 본문으로 건너뛰기
noteforge
notestagsgraph
…
© 2026 — noteforgebuilt {date}rss
``` - **Mobile (<640px)**: nav collapses to slide-down sheet (200ms), brand mark stays, theme toggle stays. Header height 48px. ### `Note` (article body) ```html

{title}

{date} {updated && updated {updated}} {tags.map(t => #{t})}
``` - `h1`/`h2`/`h3`: `font-serif text-h{n} text-heading` with `mt-{7|6|5}` and `mb-{4|3|2}`. - `h4`: `font-sans text-h4 text-heading mt-5 mb-2`. - Body `

`: `text-body leading-[1.7] my-4` — measure clamped by parent. - Inline ``: `text-link underline decoration-1 underline-offset-[3px] hover:decoration-2 hover:text-link-hover transition-[color,text-decoration-thickness] duration-fast`. - Inline ``: `font-mono text-code bg-code text-code rounded-sm px-1 py-[1px]`. - `

`: `relative font-mono text-code bg-code rounded-lg p-4 overflow-x-auto` with corner language chip `{lang}`.
- `
`: `border-l-[3px] border-strong pl-5 my-6 italic text-muted` (no bg, no quote glyph).
- ``: `rounded-lg w-full` inside `
